pending.title: Agent eval non-determinism — thinking+temp=0 incompatible; mitigated via N=3 strict-all-pass
pending.summary: Anthropic API silently overrides temp=0 back to 1 when thinking mode is enabled. Production agent uses thinking — so eval framework fought an API constraint instead of working with it. Resolution: mirror production, run each case N=3 with strict-all-pass. Framework immediately proved value by catching that a single-run pass was stochastic.
